race.comment: TILL QUEEN (7) continued her strong form this prep when the comfortable winner of a BM56 over this distance at Echuca last start. That was her first try at the mile and it was a career-best performance. Can go to this next level now. MICKIO (3) made late ground without threatening when fresh from a 24-week spell over 1400m at Ballarat last time out. Has a far better second-up record and the extra 200m is a positive. Big chance in this slightly easier contest. DEALER SING (4) started in the red on debut over this trip at Kilmore and was never in doubt, leading from the outset. Given a two-month let-up by the Maher stable since that impressive effort. Has the X-factor. JET JITSU (1) was asked to shoulder 66kgs on a heavy track last start so forget that run. Gets some welcomed weight relief today and his record at the mile is solid. I WILL SHINE (5) is on trial at this distance. On-pacer who will give backers a sight.
